description: A pharmacy technician notices that the stock of a common antibiotic is low and needs to order more.

nodes.task_description: Check the current on-hand quantity of the antibiotic in the pharmacy system.

expected_outcome.value: Technician confirms the stock is below the designated par level.

nodes.task_description: Generate a purchase order for the medication from the primary wholesaler.

expected_outcome.value: The system creates a purchase order for the standard reorder quantity.

nodes.task_description: Transmit the purchase order to the wholesaler.

expected_outcome.value: The order is successfully sent, and an electronic confirmation is received.
